ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metabolic_processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metabolic process */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of metabolic process (e.g., aerobic respiration, iron reduction) */,
  "lifestyle" TEXT /* Lifestyle of the organisms involved (e.g., obligate aerobes) */,
  "electron_acceptor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the electron acceptors table */,
  "products" TEXT /* Products formed as a result of the process (e.g., H2O, CO2) */,
  "standard_potential" REAL /* Standard reduction potential of the process [V] */,
  "reaction_equation" TEXT /* Chemical equation representing the metabolic reaction */,
  "ec_number" TEXT /* Enzyme Commission number associated with the process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the process was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the process was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metabolic_processes_electron_acceptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("electron_acceptor_id") REFERENCES electron_acceptors ("acceptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organism_types" (
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organism */,
  "organism_name" TEXT /* Name of the organism (e.g., Geobacter sulfurreducens) */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metabolic process it is associated with */,
  "taxonomic_rank" TEXT /* Taxonomic rank of the organism (e.g., domain, phylum, class) */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the organism */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the organism */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the organism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organism_types_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES metabolic_processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electron_acceptors" (
  "acceptor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electron acceptor */,
  "acceptor_name" TEXT /* Name of the electron acceptor (e.g., O2, Fe(III)) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of electron acceptor (e.g., oxidizing agent) */,
  "standard_potential" REAL /* Standard reduction potential of the electron acceptor [V] */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the electron acceptor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the acceptor was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the acceptor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acceptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research study focusing on microbial metabolism */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the study was conducted */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator leading the study */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency supporting the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the study was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the study was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metabolic_pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metabolic pathway */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the metabolic pathway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metabolic pathway */,
  "electron_acceptor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the electron acceptors table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the pathway was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the pathway was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metabolic_pathways_electron_acceptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("electron_acceptor_id") REFERENCES electron_acceptors ("acceptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enzymes" (
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enzyme */,
  "enzyme_name" TEXT /* Name of the enzyme */,
  "ec_number" TEXT /* Enzyme Commission number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the enzyme */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the enzyme was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the enzyme was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enzyme_process_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the enzymes table */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the metabolic processes table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzyme_process_relationships_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES metabolic_processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzyme_process_relationships_enzyme_id FOREIGN KEY ("enzyme_id") REFERENCES enzymes ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_process_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the research studies table */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the metabolic processes table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_process_relationships_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES metabolic_processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_process_relationships_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)
